race.comment: ST FAITH'S (7) peaks and has been racing at the provincials. Wasn't too far away at Newcastle last time and is much better placed. She has to deal with the outside barrier but that should be less of a niggle on a heavy track. Stablemate SILVER TEMPEST (1) resumes with two trial placings under the saddle. Found a place at his only fresh outing and will be naturally improved. Will race over further but has a handy 3kg claim she has winning claims in this line-up. COCO DREAMING (4) was quickly back on track winning impressively this track/trip. The 2kg claim remains handy and she has each-way claims. ROYAL TEENS (5) was only beaten 1L here in better grade last and draws well. Looker stays aboard and she is well in the mix.
